description_long: This is a tall, narrow wooden cabinet with a rich reddish-brown finish and ornate gold accents on the front. The front face features a decorative grille or latticework in the upper section, possibly for ventilation or aesthetic appeal, and a solid lower panel with a central gold embellishment. The sides are plain and unadorned, emphasizing the verticality of the piece. The back is completely solid and lacks any decorative features. The cabinet stands on four short legs, slightly elevating it above the ground. Its overall design suggests it could be used for storage in an urban environment, such as on a sidewalk, in a park, or near a building entrance.
description: A tall, narrow reddish-brown wooden cabinet with ornate gold accents and a decorative grille on the front, standing on four short legs. The sides and back are plain, emphasizing its vertical, elegant design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the decorative grille, gold accents, and central embellishment on the lower panel.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the cabinet's narrow profile and plain, unadorned surface.
description_view_2: Back view displays a solid, featureless panel with no decoration.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to the other side, showing the narrow, plain surface.

license_info.creator_display_name: 杭州维界科技有限公司
